v0.5.0 DeprecationWarning cycle completed in v0.6.0: kwarg 'source_path' was removed from the public escape-hatch wrapper. Internal-only kwargs '_is_retry' and 'operation_variant' were removed alongside but are not audit-visible (underscored). Default-shape callers (client.rpc_call(method, params)) see no behavior change since the canonical defaults still flow through RpcExecutor.rpc_call. See docs/deprecations.md 'Removed in v0.6.0' and CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] for migration.
Same break as notebooklm.NotebookLMClient.rpc_call above; this entry covers the audit's dotted-module-path view of the same callable.
